languagename.cnr.comment: XTIT: the official language name of Montenegro: Montenegrin

calendarweek.wide.comment: XTIT: the long pattern for formatting a date using calendar week number

calendarweek.narrow.comment: XTIT: the short pattern for formatting a date using calendar week number

date.placeholder.comment: XTXT: Placeholder text for input control with a sample value such as date or time; demo output "e.g. 31/12/2022" (translation must contain an abbreviated form of "for example" such as the English "e.g." to keep the placeholder short)
